description:

“Want me to just fuck the attitude out of you?”

4/7 brat tamer series

Of course, having been with you for so long, he knew you better than you knew yourself. If speaking to you like a civil human being didn’t work out, he’d fuck you nice and rough, drinking in your cries and pleas. Not once did he leave you feeling empty, making sure to fill you up multiple times. Isn’t that what you asked for?
